Package egovframework.let.uss.sam.stp.web

Class EgovStplatManageController

java.lang.Object
egovframework.let.uss.sam.stp.web.EgovStplatManageController
@Controller public class EgovStplatManageController extends Object
약관내용을 처리하는 비즈니스 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.04.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
